messages.body: Whenever you have time - could you please call on this number : 775 - 521 - 6213
I never received a call. I want to make sure I am not charged in 2 days. Please make sure this doesnt happen please!
Hey Elizabeth - I did give you a call and it’s been going to voicemail

Thank you for contacting Your Aesthetic Oasis! So sorry to have missed your call. We are either away from our desk or performing a customized treatment. We will get back to you as soon as possible. For scheduling an appo…
Hey Elizabeth! Hope you’re doing well. Would you have a few minutes today for a quick call? I’d like to understand things better so I can help you more effectively.
Yes thats fine
Can I give you a quick call in 40mins?
Sure, would 10:45am work?
Hey! I don’t want to be charged for this month. I got an email stating next payment would be 11/12. Can we connect and do what we need to do so I won’t be charged? Thanks!
Do you have any availability on Monday?

Im with my kids all day today. Im sorry. Also, as much as I have enjoyed working with you and appreciate all of your hard work, I have already made my decision to proceed with the other marketing team, so I don’t know th…
Hi!
Ok, I can be available tomorrow after 2:45
Elizabeth - do you have sometime today?
Hey Elizabeth, likewise I had a great experience working with you as well! It’s just a process that we have to follow
